import React from 'react'

import OrcamentoButton from '../BotaoOrcamento/OrcamentoButton.jsx'
import Presentation from '../InPages/Presentation/Presentation.jsx'

import "../Peres Seguranca/peresseguranca.css"
import Main from '../InPages/Main/Main.jsx'


const PeresSeguranca = () => {
  return (
    <>
      <section id="peresseguranca">

        <Main title="Peres Segurança" slogan={"Qualidade e Confiança"} img={"../../imgs/main\ img.png"} />



      </section>

      <Presentation></Presentation>
    </>


  )
}

export default PeresSeguranca
